mapper.select: select st.user_id, st.user_name, dep.dep_id from student st left join department dep on dep.dep_id = st.dep_id and dep.delete_flg = false where st.user_id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} and st.delete_flg = false
select user_id, user_name from student where delete_flg = false order by user_id
select dep_id, dep_name from department where delete_flg = false order by dep_id

select st.user_id, st.user_name, dep.dep_name from student st left join department dep on dep.dep_id = st.dep_id and dep.delete_flg = false where st.delete_flg = false
and st.user_name like CONCAT('%',#{userName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
and st.dep_id = #{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
order by st.user_id
mapper.update:
update student
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and delete_flg = false

update student
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dep_id = #{depId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_date_time = current_timestamp
where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and delete_flg = false

update student
delete_flg = true, update_date_time = current_timestamp
where user_id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and delete_flg = false
mapper.insert: insert into student ( user_name, dep_id, create_date_time, update_date_time ) values ( #{userName}, #{depId}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
mapper.select: select user_id from student where delete_flg = false and user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and user_id != #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
